articles.title: Canada Breaks Ranks: Vaccine-Injured Finally Get Their Day in Court
articles.summary: Canadian MP Dean Allison launches citizen-led inquiry into vaccine injuries after compensation schemes in UK and Canada reject most claims. The global accountability movement grows as injured citizens demand transparency after being systematically ignored by health authorities.

articles.title: Bombshell: Leaked Documents Expose Gates' $430 Million NIH Influence Operation
articles.summary: Internal documents reveal Bill Gates spent over $430 million to shape research at the National Institutes of Health, with NIH Director Francis Collins coordinating private meetings. The leaked itineraries expose the billionaire's unprecedented capture of America's top medical research institution.

articles.title: Gates Foundation's Stranglehold on U.S. Medical Research Finally Documented
articles.summary: Comprehensive investigation reveals how Bill Gates' billions have systematically captured American medical research institutions. The philanthropic facade masks unprecedented corporate influence over public health policy and scientific priorities.

articles.title: Virginia Health Officials Push 'Reckless' MMR Shots on 6-Month-Old Infants
articles.summary: Virginia's Department of Health recommends MMR vaccines for infants as young as 6 months, defying CDC guidelines and pediatric standards. Medical experts denounce the move as reckless experimentation on the most vulnerable population.

articles.title: U.S. Senator Exposes COVID Shot Injuries: 'These Are Gene Therapies, Not Vaccines'
articles.summary: Senator demands disease classification for COVID injection injuries, declaring 'these injection injuries are real.' The senator correctly identifies mRNA shots as gene therapy, breaking through years of regulatory gaslighting about vaccine definitions.

articles.title: FDA's Criminal Cover-Up: How Child Deaths from COVID Vaccines Were Hidden
articles.summary: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary finally admits the agency investigated child deaths following COVID-19 vaccination after months of denial. The admission exposes a systematic cover-up of pediatric fatalities that health authorities knew about but concealed from parents.

articles.title: OpenAI Whistleblower Found Dead: 'Execution Angle' Challenges Suicide Narrative
articles.summary: Tech whistleblower Suchir Balaji, who exposed OpenAI's illegal training methods for ChatGPT, found dead in suspicious circumstances. New forensic evidence and death scene photos suggest execution rather than suicide, while his parents demand murder investigation.

articles.title: Obesity Doctor Reveals How to Hijack Your Body's Natural GLP-1 Without Big Pharma
articles.summary: Physician who helped develop weight-loss injections exposes how simple dietary changes can naturally trigger GLP-1 response. The revelation threatens billion-dollar drug profits by showing patients how to achieve results without expensive pharmaceutical interventions.

articles.title: Exposed: Gates Spent $430 Million to Capture NIH Research Agenda
articles.summary: Leaked documents reveal Bill Gates personally directed over $430 million to influence National Institutes of Health research priorities, including private meetings with NIH Director Francis Collins. The billionaire's foundation effectively purchased control over America's medical research apparatus.

articles.title: Gates' Billions Buy Medical Authority — Investigation Exposes Research Corruption
articles.summary: Comprehensive investigation reveals how Bill Gates has systematically captured U.S. medical research through strategic donations and private influence operations. The Gates Foundation operates as shadow medical authority, directing research priorities away from affordable solutions.

articles.title: Canada Finally Opens Door for Vaccine-Injured to Testify — Compensation Schemes Exposed as Shams
articles.summary: Canadian MP Dean Allison launches citizen inquiry into vaccine injuries after government compensation programs rejected most claims. UK and Canadian schemes designed to silence victims rather than provide justice for documented adverse effects.

articles.title: Tech Whistleblower's 'Suicide' — Forensics Point to Execution After AI Exposé
articles.summary: Suchir Balaji found dead after exposing OpenAI's illegal training methods for ChatGPT. Despite police suicide ruling, forensic analysis suggests execution-style killing, while parents demand murder investigation into another convenient whistleblower death.

articles.title: Virginia Pushes 'Reckless' Early MMR Vaccines — Ignores CDC's Own Guidelines
articles.summary: Virginia Department of Health recommends MMR vaccines for infants as young as 6 months, contradicting CDC and pediatric guidelines. Medical experts call the move reckless as states abandon federal safety protocols to boost vaccination rates.

articles.title: GLP-1 Drug Inventor Reveals Natural Body Hack to Bypass Big Pharma's $1,000 Injections
articles.summary: Doctor who helped develop weight-loss drugs exposes how simple dietary plate division can naturally trigger GLP-1 response. Big Pharma's billion-dollar injection empire threatened by accessible nutritional approach that mimics expensive drug effects.

articles.title: Mainstream Matrix Exposed — New Book Reveals Medical Industry's Systematic Patient Poisoning
articles.summary: Explosive analysis reveals how medical establishment deliberately poisons patients while suppressing root cause treatments. Fear-based media, obedient education system, and captured healthcare create 'Mainstream Matrix' to maintain profitable disease states.

articles.title: Air Pollution Study Reveals Toxic Metal Contamination in Placental Tissue — Population Control by Design
articles.summary: AIIMS Delhi researchers document toxic metals in placental tissue causing fetal growth restriction and pregnancy complications. Study exposes how environmental toxins systematically damage human reproduction while regulatory agencies ignore population-level impacts.

articles.title: Major Medical Journal Buries Pfizer's Flu Vaccine Failure in Seniors — Data Too Damaging to Publish?
articles.summary: A prestigious medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's failed flu vaccine data showing poor efficacy in seniors, the very population most aggressively targeted for vaccination. This selective data reporting exposes how Big Pharma and academic journals collaborate to hide inconvenient truths about vaccine performance.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Report — The Devastating Health Toll They Don't Want You to See
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the catastrophic health consequences of COVID lockdowns, school closures, and mandates that health authorities continue to ignore. The collateral damage from these policies far exceeded any claimed benefits, yet no accountability exists for the architects of this destruction.

articles.title: Vaccine Industry's Economic Shell Game — How Government Subsidies Corrupt Medical Science
articles.summary: Analysis exposes how massive government subsidies to the vaccine industry eliminate normal market feedback mechanisms, creating perverse incentives that prioritize profit over safety. Without price signals and liability, vaccine manufacturers operate in a consequence-free bubble that distorts medical decision-making.

articles.title: Medical Student Suicide After School's Misconduct Allegations — Academic Medicine's Mental Health Crisis
articles.summary: Vaibhav Duggal took his own life after facing accusations and pressure from medical school administrators in a late-night email confrontation. His parents hold the institution responsible, highlighting the toxic culture and psychological abuse endemic in medical education that drives students to desperation.

articles.title: Microplastics Epidemic — The Environmental Health Crisis Being Ignored by Regulators
articles.summary: Emerging evidence links microplastic contamination to chronic disease as these particles lodge deep in human organs and circulate through bloodstreams. Despite mounting evidence of systemic health threats, regulatory agencies remain silent while plastic pollution continues unchecked.

articles.title: Air Pollution's Devastating Fetal Impact — Study Reveals Toxic Metal Contamination in Placentas
articles.summary: AIIMS researchers discovered toxic metals in placental tissue and identified how air pollution restricts fetal growth, increases preeclampsia risk, and damages babies before birth. This environmental health crisis receives minimal attention while industries continue polluting with impunity.

articles.title: Research Integrity Collapse — Moffitt Executive Steps Down, NSF Watchdog Unit Empty
articles.summary: Major cancer center executive forced out following investigation while NSF's oversight unit sits vacant, exposing the systematic breakdown of scientific integrity mechanisms. The hijacked journal epidemic continues growing with over 450 entries as academic corruption spreads unchecked.

articles.title: GLP-1 Genetic Resistance — Stanford Exposes Why Weight Loss Drugs Fail 10% of Patients
articles.summary: Stanford researchers identified genetic variants that render Ozempic and Wegovy ineffective in roughly 10% of patients, information that could have prevented countless failed treatments. This pharmacogenetic data reveals how personalized medicine insights are buried while one-size-fits-all approaches dominate clinical practice.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Exposes Empty NSF Watchdog Unit — Who's Policing Scientific Misconduct?
articles.summary: Retraction Watch reveals NSF's oversight unit is essentially empty while scientific misconduct cases pile up. With over 65,000 entries in their retraction database and 450+ hijacked journals identified, the foxes are clearly running the henhouse. Meanwhile, Moffitt executives quietly step down following corruption probes.

articles.title: Microplastics Found Lodged in Human Organs — The Chronic Disease Connection They Don't Want You to Know
articles.summary: Emerging evidence directly links microplastic contamination to chronic disease as these particles circulate through bloodstreams and embed in living tissue. You're absorbing plastic daily through air, food, and water, but mainstream medicine ignores this environmental toxin epidemic.

articles.title: Medical Student Suicide After School's Late-Night Harassment — The Dark Side of Medical Education
articles.summary: Vaibhav Duggal took his own life after facing accusations and harassment from medical school administrators. His parents blame the institution's toxic culture and late-night intimidation tactics. Medical schools are destroying the very people they claim to train as healers.

articles.title: Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data Buried by Major Journal — Seniors Left in the Dark
articles.summary: A prestigious medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's failed flu vaccine efficacy data in seniors, hiding evidence that the shots don't work in vulnerable populations. This is textbook pharma fraud — burying inconvenient results while promoting ineffective products to those who need protection most.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Finally Documented — The Carnage They Tried to Hide
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the shocking scope of damage caused by COVID policies, from developmental delays in children to economic devastation. The public health establishment spent years denying these harms while silencing critics. The evidence is now undeniable.

articles.title: Vaccine Industry's Economic Calculation Problem — When Profit Trumps Science
articles.summary: Jeffrey Tucker exposes how the vaccine industry operates without proper economic calculation, distorting risk-benefit analysis through government subsidies and liability protection. Market signals are completely corrupted when pharma profits are guaranteed regardless of product performance.
